name: Will | Metaphor
description:
A brief moment of respite || 👑

The party is on their way to their next objective. And Will is looking for anything to quell his boredom.

--

Author's note: I had to make this bot twice because Chrome reset the tab bc I exited the app for like 10 seconds?? (I'm on incognito)

The bot was already uploaded, all I had left to do was make it public. And then, all of a sudden, it's gone! Yaaay! Yippie! :))))

Also Will's personality is based mostly on the Metaphor manga
creator: reinousha98
